questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to TCP Congestion Control?
options: Inefficient scaling of Slow Start thresholds, Congestion Avoidance increments, Fast Retransmit, and Fast Recovery states.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Slow Start thresholds, Congestion Avoidance increments, Fast Retransmit, and Fast Recovery states.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Slow Start thresholds, Congestion Avoidance increments, Fast Retransmit, and Fast Recovery states scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
